caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and a tall, grey, spiky wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and several mannequins dressed in clothing. A yellow "LEE" brand sign is visible behind him. On the left side of the screen, a logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," and a similar "BOSS TALK JOY" logo appears on the right. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a fixed position, slightly shifting his facial expression and mouth movement as he speaks, while the camera and surrounding environment remain static.
